justifications.clarity: Prose flows from the Tetlock narrative through conceptual motivation to formal definitions; bridge sentence before Section 2.3 prevents abrupt abstraction; all technical terms defined before use.
justifications.rigor: All empirical claims cite specific papers (Tetlock 2007, LM 2011, Lopez-Lira & Tang 2023, Fama 1970); mathematical formulas for BoW, TF-IDF, Skip-Gram objective, GloVe objective, and textual signal are correctly stated; BOOK-ONLY tags honestly defer deeper derivations.
justifications.completeness: All four stated learning objectives are fully addressed across Sections 1-4; financial text type table, four key empirical facts, identification challenges, and PCA case study reference are all present; deferred Objective 5 (API usage) is transparently flagged.
justifications.pedagogy: Learning objectives stated at the top with clear numbering; difficulty progresses from narrative history to formal mathematics; nearest-neighbours table and financial word-analogy examples ground abstract concepts; companion notebook reference provided.
justifications.style: Opening anecdote (Tetlock spreadsheet) and Firth quotation give the notes authentic voice; notation is consistent with the paired chapter; markdown formatting (headers, tables, math fences, BOOK-ONLY comments) is correct throughout.
